ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "artist_genres" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of genres the artist is associated with */,
  "artist_popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "artist_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score indicating the musical positiveness */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song in beats per minute (BPM) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in decibels (dB) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (major or minor) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "cluster" INTEGER /* Cluster ID for grouping similar songs */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the song has explicit content */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the song's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_cluster FOREIGN KEY ("cluster") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster's characteristics */,
  "cluster_size" INTEGER /* Number of songs in the cluster */,
  "cluster_average_popularity" REAL /* Average popularity score of songs in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total time the user has spent listening to music on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being interacted with */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity (e.g., play duration) */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity occurred (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all songs in the playlist */,
  "playlist_privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
